author: m.kalinin
content:
> the parent beacon block is not passed to the  EL since this block is synced over devp2p, but the value used is committed in the block hash. 

And we don't check that `parent_hash` commits to the same content on CL and EL, EL checks `parent_hash` when processing parent payload with its own values in the block header, CL doesn't check anything except for accumulator which lacks `parent_beacon_block_root`. This is the place whether the thing gets broken
